summary: Comprehensive testing of BMIA (Bharat Market Intel Agent) dashboard completed successfully. All backend APIs working with real market data from yfinance. Frontend UI responsive with proper navigation, charts, and LLM integration. No critical bugs found.
passed_tests: Full stock analysis for RELIANCE.NS (Alpha Score: 53.0, Recommendation: NEUTRAL)
Batch scanner processing 19 stocks with alpha scores
AI chat integration with 3257 character response
Symbol search input and analyze button
Quick symbol buttons (RELIANCE, TCS, HDFCBANK, GC, INFY)
SEBI disclaimers visible on all pages
Tab switching (Technical, Fundamental, News, AI Agent, Formulas)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (core functionality working, analysis takes expected 15-20 seconds)
